meta.title: Championing Competition: The Role of National Security in Antitrust Enforcement
meta.description: Join Hudson Institute for a discussion with Commissioner Noah Joshua Phillips on how national security fits into the debates surrounding antitrust. The conversation will be moderated by Hudson Senior Fellow, Harold Furchtgott-Roth.
